specific_question: What was the customer service representative turnover rate at MediConn Solutions in Q3 2024?
answer: In Q3 2024, MediConn Solutions' CSR turnover rate was 12% according to its human resources department, which is lower than the industry average of 18% for virtual healthcare customer service roles.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
